raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
STEP 2: Hold eyelids open and rotate eye while rinsing.
STEP 3: Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.

DO NOT: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.

ESCALATE: Seek medical attention immediately or call Poison Control. Bring the product label.

immediate_steps: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
Hold eyelids open and rotate eye while rinsing.
Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
do_not_do: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.
escalate_when: Seek medical attention immediately or call Poison Control. Bring the product label.
